input_text: Debugging the session-loader bug took all afternoon. The tests kept passing locally but failing in CI — absolute nightmare. Finally tracked it down to a timezone mismatch between the test fixture and the CI runner clock. Added an explicit UTC conversion in the loader; all green now.
reviewer_notes: The session describes a successfully resolved bug. 'Absolute nightmare' is frustration phrasing, not a concrete negative signal — the problem was fixed, so it belongs in positive signals (which we don't capture). No entry here.
